section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports limited respiratory function.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a patient-reported symptom and belongs in the Subjective section, not Objective findings.
This describes an existing medication regimen, not a new order or change, so it belongs in the Subjective section as current medication use.
Vaccination status is part of the patient's history/status rather than an explicit management action; it fits better in Subjective but its placement in Plan is not highly misleading.
